description: You are a Maintenance Planner implementing a new energy efficiency policy. Using the policy memo at /home/ga/Desktop/energy_policy_memo.txt, update the thermostat asset records for the 'Headquarters' building in OpenMaint (login: admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/). For Smart thermostats in the Headquarters building, update the Notes field to include 'Profile: Eco-2026'. For Manual or legacy digital thermostats in the Headquarters building, update the Notes field to include 'Action: Replace'. This policy applies exclusively to the Headquarters building; do not modify assets in other locations.
